title: Colored Advancements
description: Spice up your Advancement tab with vibrant colors, including support with Better Advancements!
body:
# Add a Pop of Color to Your Advancements!

Tired of the same old Advancement tab? Want to celebrate your progression with a burst of color?

Introducing Colored Advancements, a vibrant Resource pack that adds personality into your Minecraft experience. With this pack, every Advancement you complete will be marked with a unique and distinct color, making your progress feel more rewarding and fun!

# Support For Better Advancements

This Resource Pack also has full support for the Datapack [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better_advancements), having color support for all of the Advancements added in that pack!
